# HIDDeviceClient.Notification.deviceRemoved

**Case**

A notification that the device is no longer connected to the system.

## Declaration

```swift
case deviceRemoved
```

## Discussion

After the device is removed, no other notifications occur and most methods fail. Discard the [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient].
title: HIDDeviceClient.Notification.deviceRemoved
